mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CLASS ( CLASS_ID, YEAR, SEMESTER, GRADE, CLASS_NO, CLASS_NAME, CLASS_STATUS, ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN, INVITE_CODE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DEFAULT_DUE_TIME, DESCRIPTION ) VALUES ( #{classId}, #{dto.year}, #{dto.semester}, #{dto.grade}, #{dto.classNo}, #{dto.className}, 'ACTIVE', 1, #{inviteCode}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, '23:59', #{dto.description} )
INSERT INTO TEACHER_CLASS ( T_CLASS_ID, TEACHER_ID, CLASS_ID, START_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, ASSIGNED_AT ) VALUES ( #{teacherClassId}, #{teacherId}, #{classId}, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC2 WHERE SC2.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID ) AS memberCount FROM CLASS C JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND C.CLASS_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName FROM CLASS C JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC2 WHERE SC2.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID ) AS memberCount FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId}

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName, S.STUDENT_NAME AS childName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC2 WHERE SC2.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID ) AS memberCount FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN STUDENT_PARENT SP ON SP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT DISTINCT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName, S.STUDENT_NAME AS childName FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN STUDENT_PARENT SP ON SP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId}

SELECT CLASS_ID AS classId, YEAR AS year, SEMESTER AS semester, GRADE AS grade, CLASS_NO AS classNo, CLASS_NAME AS className, CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, DESCRIPTION AS description FROM CLASS WHERE UPPER(INVITE_CODE) = UPPER(#{inviteCode}) AND CLASS_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_CLASS ( STUDENT_CLASS_ID, STUDENT_ID, CLASS_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE ) VALUES ( #{studentClassId}, #{studentId}, #{classId}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE CLASS SET CLASS_NAME = #{dto.className}, CLASS_STATUS = #{dto.classStatus}, GRADE = #{dto.grade}, CLASS_NO = #{dto.classNo}, DESCRIPTION = #{dto.description}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

UPDATE CLASS SET DEFAULT_DUE_TIME = #{dto.defaultDueTime}, ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN = #{dto.allowSubmissionModifyYn}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

UPDATE CLASS SET INVITE_CODE = #{inviteCode}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

UPDATE CLASS SET CLASS_STATUS = 'ARCHIVED', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )
